# Benchmark / Test Evidence PRs

Optimization recipe: Mine shape sets, tolerance rules, warmup logic, and profile commands before mutating code.

NCU first look: Use the PR's benchmark/profile command as the first replay target.

## Inspection Questions

- Which benchmark shape distribution did the PR validate?
- Which correctness/tolerance test should become part of the standalone harness?

## PRs

| Repo | PR | Merged | What to inspect | Ledger key |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
